3308450.name: RPG Maker MZ - Soldier Character Pack 3
3308450.description:
Create the sci-fi super soldier game you’ve been dreaming of with the Soldier Character Pack 3! Gee-kun-soft is back with another set of 16 characters to fill your world with all-new party members, villains, and NPCs. Each character comes with a MZ-style sprite, faceset with 8 emotions, SV battler, front view enemy images, and waist-up bust images, so they’re ready for anything, no matter if you want them fighting your heroes, joining the squad, or just hanging out and gossiping in the mess hall!

10 of the soldiers also have variations for their sprites and images to include helmets so you can make sure they’re all properly equipped to battle titanic space monsters! This pack also includes high-resolution images of each character, so you can have a full body image in your menus or resize them to perfectly fit your game window.

Pick up the Soldier Character Pack 3 and give your sci-fi worlds some space rangers ready to stop evil!


Features:

* 8 male and 8 female come with:

* animated SV battlers
* portrait bust images with 8 emotions each (with more variants)
* facesets with 8 emotions each
* enemy battlers with 13 variations each (with more variants)
* walking sprites

BONUS: All 16 characters in large-scale full-character artwork


Terms and Conditions:

* This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
* OK to be used in Commercial projects
* Contents can be edited
* OK for use in games with gore
* OK for use in adult-rated games
3308450.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 韩语
